name: world-net-hosting
description: World Net Hosting separated frontend and backend services

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.check: node --check frontend/server.js && node --check frontend/scripts-build-static.mjs && node --check frontend/assets/js/app.js && node --check frontend/assets/js/hosting-dashboard.js && node --check backend/src/server.js && node --check backend/src/preflight.js && node --check backend/src/routes/hostingRoutes.js && node --check backend/src/services/githubApp.js && node --check deployment-worker/src/server.js
scripts.audit: npm run check && npm --prefix backend run smoke && npm --prefix frontend run build
